debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
n : ℕ
v : Vector α n
f : α → β
⊢ Vector.mapIdx (fun x => f) v = Vector.map f v

failed_attempts:
simp
  | succ n =>
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      simp [Vector.map, Vector.mapIdx]
    | succ n ih =>
      simp_all [Vector.map, Vector.mapIdx, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, List.map, List.map]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ]) <;>
      (try congr) <;>
      (try simp_all [Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ]) <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try simp_all [Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ]) <;>
      (try congr) <;>
      (try simp_all [Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ]) <;>
      (try aesop)
      <;>
      simp_all [Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ]
      <;>
      congr
      <;>
      simp_all [Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ]
      <;>
      aesop

simp [Vector.map, Vector.mapIdx]
  | cons hd tl ih =>
    simp_all [Vector.map, Vector.mapIdx]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Function.comp]) <;>
    (try congr <;> ext <;> simp_all) <;>
    (try simp_all [Vector.ext_iff]) <;>
    (try simp_all [Fin.val_zero]) <;>
    (try simp_all [Fin.val_succ])
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [List.map]
        <;>
        (try simp_all [List.length])
        <;>
        (try simp_all [List.get])
        <;>
        (try simp_all [List.get?])
        <;>
        (try simp_all [List.cons_get])
        <;>
        (try simp_all [List.nil_get])
        <;>
        (try simp_all [List.nil_cons])
        <;>
        (try simp_all [List.cons_nil])
        <;>
        (try simp_all [List.cons_cons])
        <;>
        (try simp_all [List.nil_nil])
      })

simp [Vector.map_index, Vector.mapIdx_index]
    <;> simp_all [Function.comp_apply]
    <;> aesop
  exact h_main v
